description: Add() method has no null guard for the 'player' parameter. Passing null will throw a NullReferenceException on 'player.Id' access, which is confusing and does not clearly indicate the actual problem.
suggestion: Add 'ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(player);' at the start of the Add method, before the lock.

description: Update() method has no null guard for the 'player' parameter. Passing null will throw a NullReferenceException on 'player.Id' access instead of a clear ArgumentNullException.
suggestion: Add 'ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(player);' at the start of the Update method, before the lock.
